analysis.test: Characterization of the […] as insufficient in light of the duration of the established commercial relationship and the state of economic dependence — article L. 442-1, II of the [Commercial] Code (formerly L. 442-6, I, 5° prior to ord. 2019-359): the […] is assessed in concreto taking into account the duration of the relationship AND aggravating circumstances, in particular economic dependence.
analysis.faits: Méridian Studios has been exploiting Bastille since at least 2018 (order […] 2 dated 07/24/2018, Kbis, trademark no. 4449595). The mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of 09/13/2021 and the letter of 10/05/2021 evidence a sudden termination of the commercial relationship with Cassiopée/Camille Lefèvre, without […] adequate notice adapted to the duration of the relationship or to Méridian Studios' economic dependence. The certified accountant Camille Lefèvre's attestation (Exhibit 3) records variations in Bastille sales for 2020/2021 on Amazon and at […], revealing a direct economic impact of the termination/competing exploitation through Tohu-Bohu.
analysis.faille: Absence of exhibits establishing: (1) the precise and continuous duration of the commercial relationship between Méridian Studios and Cassiopée; (2) the share of Méridian Studios' revenue dependent on that relationship; (3) the absence or inadequacy of the notice […] given; (4) the impossibility for Méridian Studios to transition its business within the notice period granted.
analysis.riposte: Counter with decisions [1] and [4]: the sufficient […] is assessed in concreto taking into account not only the duration but also the state of economic dependency, which constitutes an autonomous aggravating circumstance extending the required notice period. Submit the attestation […] demonstrating the post-termination decline in Bastille sales as evidence of the dependency. Note that the cease-and-desist letter (mise en demeure) of 13/09/2021 and the letter of 05/10/2021 evidence a sudden termination without adequate […] notice. Emphasize that an established commercial relationship does not require a formal framework agreement: the regularity and continuity of commercial dealings are sufficient.
analysis.pourquoi: The available exhibits (Kbis, trademark, order […] 2, affidavit […]) establish the existence of Méridian Studios and its Bastille business activity, but do not directly document: (1) the precise and continuous duration of the commercial relationship between Méridian Studios and Cassiopée; (2) the share of Méridian Studios's revenue dependent on that relationship; (3) the absence or formal insufficiency of the […] notice served; or (4) the impossibility of […] within the time period granted.

autorites.title: Cass. com. 13-16.398, 20 May 2014
themes: préjudice distinct de celui de la rupture brutale (non)
autorites.summary:
En cas de rupture d'une relation commerciale établie, le […] suffisant s'apprécie en tenant compte de la durée de la relation commerciale et des autres circonstances, notamment de l'état de dépendance économique de […] évincée, au moment de la notification de la rupture, et en cas d'insuffisance du […], le préjudice en résultant est évalué en fonction de la durée du […] jugée nécessaire. 
Il en résulte que la victime de la rupture ne peut prétendre à une indemnisation complémentaire au titre de son état de dépendance économique, cette circonstance ayant déjà été prise en compte pour la détermination de son préjudice consécutif à la brutalité de la rupture

autorites.title: Cass. com. 11-10.544, 3 May 2012
autorites.summary: Fait l'exacte application des dispositions de l'article L. 442-6 I 5° du code de […], l'arrêt […] retient que l'existence d'usages professionnels ne dispense pas la juridiction d'examiner si le […], […] respecte le délai minimal fixé par ces usages, tient compte de la durée de la relation commerciale établie […] les parties et des autres circonstances de l'espèce, notamment de l'état de dépendance économique de […] évincée

analysis.acte_referme: Account statement or summary schedule of orders/invoices between Méridian Studios and Cassiopée covering the entire duration of the relationship, supplemented by a financial statement certified by the chartered accountant […] establishing the share of revenue dependent on Cassiopée and the post-termination decline.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Cassiopée/Camille Lefèvre will contest the very existence of an 'established commercial relationship' within the meaning of L. 442-6 with Méridian Studios, arguing that the relationship […] between the parties was one of copyright/intellectual property litigation rather than a continuous commercial relationship generating a characterized economic dependency; it will deny any […] to give in the absence of a framework agreement or documented regular commercial flow.
analysis.these_adverse: Cassiopée/Camille Lefèvre, relying on Exhibit 31 (Cass. com. 12 June 2012) and Exhibit 18 (CA Aix-en-Provence, 15 Sept. 2016), will argue that the cause of action for abrupt termination of an established commercial relationship is time-barred or inadmissible, on the ground that the alleged facts originate in a prior act (exploitation of disputed rights), and that the abrupt-termination claim is in reality a repackaging of an already time-barred intellectual-property dispute. It will further argue that Méridian Studios fails to demonstrate any established commercial relationship distinct from the copyright dispute, so that Article L. 442-6 is inapplicable, and that the mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of 13/09/2021 does not constitute a commercial termination but merely a notification of cessation of unlawful exploitation.

pieces_adverses.piece: Absence of a framework agreement or formalized commercial agreement […] Méridian Studios and Cassiopée
pieces_adverses.contre: La relation commerciale établie au sens de L. 442-6 ne requiert pas de contrat écrit : la régularité des flux suffit ; les factures et commandes produites suppléent l'absence de contrat-cadre

pieces_adverses.piece: Pièce n°31 (Cass. com. 12 juin 2012, 10-20.540) invoquée pour prescrire ou irrecevabiliser l'action
pieces_adverses.contre: Cet arrêt porte sur l'abus de procédure et l'intervention forcée d'un tiers, sans rapport avec la rupture brutale de relations commerciales ; son invocation est hors sujet et ne peut fonder une fin de non-recevoir sur L. 442-6

pieces_adverses.piece: Pièce n°18 (CA Aix-en-Provence, 15 sept. 2016) sur la prescription de l'action en concurrence déloyale
pieces_adverses.contre: L'action en rupture brutale (L. 442-6) est autonome de l'action en concurrence déloyale et soumise à sa propre prescription quinquennale courant à compter de la rupture (13/09/2021) ; la prescription n'est pas acquise

pieces_attendues: Summary schedule of orders/invoices between Méridian Studios and Cassiopée covering the entire duration of the relationship (with dates and amounts)
Certified attestation from the chartered accountant […] quantifying the share of Méridian Studios' revenue dependent on the relationship with Cassiopée and the post-termination decline.
Commercial correspondence (emails, purchase orders) […] between Méridian Studios and Cassiopée establishing the continuity and regularity of the relationship.
Written notice of termination (mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of 09/13/2021 + letter of 10/05/2021) demonstrating the absence of […] adequate notice.
